chunks.title: Instructions for Silver Trumpets
chunks.reason: A complete legal instruction regarding the making and usage of trumpets for assembly, travel, war, and feasts.

chunks.title: Order of March from Sinai
chunks.reason: A detailed catalog describing the sequence in which the tribes and Levitical families set out from the wilderness.

chunks.title: Moses Invites Hobab
chunks.reason: A dialogue exchange between Moses and his father-in-law Hobab regarding their journey to the Promised Land.

chunks.title: The Ark Leads the Way
chunks.reason: A narrative account of the journey beginning with the ark leading and Moses reciting two short prayers.
